versions.version_description: Mostly chords, but does have some melody driven parts such as the intro and the end of the chorus. The song, however, can be played entirely with chords, as notated above the tabbed sections. Chords are listed along with how to play them. If you want to play chords at the beginning of the second verse, just repeat the same chords from the first verse. Additionally, if you have a second guitar, the intro can be played throughout the entire song (except the bridge/outro) while the other guitar is playing the chords. As for the strumming pattern, this song has no guitar and therefore no true strumming pattern. The ones I created are just based on the bass and the hook. So you can use them as a guide if you want, but I honestly would just strum however is easiest and/or sounds best to you.

tuning: E A D G B E
